name: Iso11783IL_OPScreenCapture
title: Iso11783IL_OPScreenCapture
syntax: long Iso11783IL_OPScreenCapture( dword itemRequested, dword path ); // form 1
long Iso11783IL_OPScreenCapture( dbNode implement, dword itemRequested, dword path ); // form 2
description: Sends a Screen Capture command to the Virtual Terminal to request a screen capture of the current screen image.

parameters.name: implement
parameters.description: Simulation node to apply the function.

parameters.name: itemRequested
parameters.description: Requested item 0: Screen Image 240-255: Manufacturer Proprietary

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Path of the request 1: VT accessible storage/removable media 240-255: Manufacturer Proprietary

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
